# PERF-163 negative: db.QueryRow for a single-row query
lang: go
file: PERF-163-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "database/sql"

func FindUser(db *sql.DB, id int) (string, error) {
	var name string
	err := db.QueryRow("SELECT name FROM users WHERE id = ?", id).Scan(&name)
	return name, err
}
